name: Chance - forsaken
description:
pfp art credit - @ kaapinon on Discord

idk what to write it's my first bot like.. hello!

I looked over all the janitor.ai platform and didn't find the bot i could normally rp with (yes yes I've seen romance bots and so on, not my cup of tea as a queerplatonic and pairings not-so-lover). and so i wanted to create a bot that would be more like a friend and a homie yk. i hope you like it!

.

I can't guarantee that the character will be canonical here. After all, I made the bot for myself first and foremost, haha, maybe you'll like it too. In any case, enjoy using it! ah and yes he's non-binary by canon so don't be scared if he suddenly uses they/them its ok.

☆

‼️REMEMBER: If the bot is overaggressive, writing weird things and so on, it's not (all the) creator's fault. ai is sometimes just crazy. but I did a few things to prevent this
creator: Kfchrr
